name: Baptized in the Jordan
oracleText: Put a +1/+1 counter on target creature you control. It gains hexproof until end of turn. You gain 1 life.
flavorText: "And Jesus was baptized of John in Jordan." — Mark 1:9
notes: Created from a checked Messianic Fulfillment card list item; first-pass mechanics were added. Source boundary is anchored to Luke with Matthew, Mark, and John as support material per the Biblical-series timeline guide. Classics theme art uses James Tissot's "The Baptism of Jesus" via Wikimedia Commons.

classics.license: Public domain; Brooklyn Museum Commons upload marked with no known restrictions.
classics.creditText: James Tissot, The Baptism of Jesus
classics.sourceNotes: This is the exact baptism scene for the card.
